title: Eric Nam Leads Unforgettable Gala Performers; Charles Melton and Anna Cathcart Among Presenters (Exclusive)
summary: Chloé Zhao, Bowen Yang, Daniel Dae Kim, Park Chan-wook, Lawrence Shou and 'KPop Demon Hunters' are set to be recognized at the event, which celebrates Asian and Pacific Islander excellence in film, TV and culture.

title: Loveholidays poised to delay £1bn London IPO after Gulf travel chaos
summary: Online travel agent was tipped to be London Stock Exchange’s first significant listing of 2026
